release_notes: v0.4.2 (BP083): Plow worker survival — true main-process worker decoupled from renderer state, never dies on UI changes. Plow Resume from Checkpoint — interrupted Plows can be resumed on next launch. Hardware-tier model auto-detection — 8 GB machines auto-select gemma2:2b instead of failing silently. Cephas split-brain permanent fix — atomic two-host deploy script, both hosts must pass verification. Onboarding lifecycle auto-advance — first-launch diagnostic banner + reset prompt for stuck-at-B machines. Post-install restart prompt carried forward.
